/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror=unused-parameter -Werror=unused-argument -Wpointer-arith -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -Wl,-undefined,error -Wl,-exported_symbols_list,"/Users/riyananosh/waydroid-xr-stubs/host/build/_deps/openxr-src/src/loader/openxr-loader.expsym" -o libopenxr_loader.dylib -install_name @rpath/libopenxr_loader.dylib CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/android_utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/api_layer_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/loader_core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/loader_init_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/loader_instance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/loader_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/loader_logger_recorders.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/manifest_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/runtime_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/__/common/object_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/xr_generated_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/__/xr_generated_dispatch_table_core.c.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/__/common/filesystem_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/__/external/jsoncpp/src/lib_json/json_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/__/external/jsoncpp/src/lib_json/json_value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/openxr_loader.dir/__/external/jsoncpp/src/lib_json/json_writer.cpp.o
